summary: Adjusted the chapter opening to avoid repeating chapter 4's sick-call entry scaffold and to align the phone detail with the surrounding boundary context, then replaced one calibration-only dialogue line that appeared verbatim in the draft.
edits: Rebuilt the opening around the wall phone and Nate using Dominic's flip phone so the chapter enters from a different spatial/action frame than chapter 4.
Changed the post-voicemail handling beat from wall-phone receiver/dial-tone wording to flip-phone wording for continuity.
Replaced Sarah's exact calibration-only reply trigger line by changing Nate's answer from "Yeah." to "Yeah, I called."
